description: Detects memory leak indicators in C++: raw new without matching delete or smart pointer, unbounded container growth in loops, missing virtual destructors. Simplified from Rust per D-09: matches new_expression in loop bodies broadly (cannot verify smart pointer wrapping, matching delete, or virtual destructor presence without cross-statement analysis). Languages field scoped to cpp only to avoid conflict with other language-specific memory_leak_indicators pipelines sharing the same pipeline name.

flag.message: new expression detected -- verify raw new is paired with matching delete or wrapped in unique_ptr/shared_ptr. In loops, prefer std::vector with reserve() over repeated push_back(). Ensure classes with virtual methods have virtual destructors to prevent undefined behavior when deleting via base pointer.
